underlying_goal: Improve documentation quality across an Android launcher repository, including creating CLAUDE.md, architecture docs, changelog, and managing git history to keep local-only docs separate
friction_detail: CHANGELOG.md was created in a worktree and user couldn't find it; merge conflict with CLAUDE.md required extra steps to resolve.
brief_summary: User wanted comprehensive documentation improvements for their Android launcher repo and git history cleanup to exclude CLAUDE.md; most docs were created successfully but worktree/merge workflow caused some friction.
